name: agentic-workflows
description: Agentic engineering workflows for Claude Code

scripts.test: node --test tests/scripts/test-render.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-gateway.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-epic-projections.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-start-projections.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-workunit-projections.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-map.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-tasks.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-transactions.cjs tests/scripts/test-engine-boot.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-start.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-workflow-continue-epic.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-workflow-continue-feature.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-workflow-continue-bugfix.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-workflow-continue-quickfix.cjs tests/scripts/test-discovery-for-workflow-continue-cross-cutting.cjs
scripts.test:migrations: for t in tests/scripts/test-migration-*.sh; do bash $t || exit 1; done
